series_metadata.series_description: All documents relating to application and issuance or denial of a permit (i.e., public notices, transmittal documents, checklists, draft permit, NODs and response letters, etc.) except the application itself. Does not include responsiveness summaries.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 months after permit is issued final unless an appeal has been filed. In appeal cases, retain until 6 months after the appeal is finally resolved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
